document.title: Letter of Request for extension of Clinical Evaluation supplementation period

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co., Ltd. requested an extension of the supplementary period for CE MDDR Clinical Evaluation 1st review supplementary items.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports traceability for a requested extension of the clinical evaluation supplementation period related to NB assessment report MDR199_2023.
keyPoints: Letter No. 2309-002 requests extension of the complementary period for supplementary items of the CE MDDR Clinical Evaluation 1st review.
Clinical Evaluation Assessment Report No. is MDR199_2023.
The 1st NB assessment date is September 12, 2023, and the deadline for request for supplemental extension is October 31, 2023.
The note states the request is to extend the supplementary period for additional literature review.
The letter is signed by Yunhee Kim, President, on behalf of H&abyz Co., Ltd.
